title: Reposition Create Metric Button
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Create Metric button properly positioned, so that the metrics page layout is clean and intuitive.
description: Fix the positioning of the "Create Metric" button on the metrics page. The button needs to be slid over to its correct position in the layout.
acceptance_criteria: Create Metric button is properly positioned in the metrics page layout
Button alignment is consistent with other UI elements on the page
ux_changes: Repositioned the Create Metric button to correct its layout alignment on the metrics page.
implementation_notes: CSS positioning fix applied to the Create Metric button.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the position and pushed to staging for incognito review.
